audit_items.proof_trace: `delete s_auctionStarts[asset]` at L367 executes unconditionally after `_onAuctionEnd` within the endedAuctions loop. `_onAuctionEnd` (L383-397) transfers the full remaining asset balance to `s_feeAggregator` when `hasFeeAggregator == true` (i.e. a separate aggregator is configured); when `hasFeeAggregator == false` the contract itself is the feeAggregator so no transfer is needed. Both conditions of the property are satisfied on every non-reverting execution path.
